parameters.query: SELECT a.*, d.summary, d.category FROM ai_analysis a LEFT JOIN ai_analysis d ON d.id = a.id WHERE a.id = $1

INSERT INTO ai_draft (zammad_ticket_id, analysis_id, draft_body, tone, language, confidence, needs_human_approval, used_sources, missing_context)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb)
RETURNING id
